title: CLI: Local Org Selection for API Keys
description: Walkthrough of CLI changes to send X-Helix-Org-ID header, do local-only org switch for hxi_ keys, and mark current org from local config.

steps.title: X-Helix-Org-ID header emission
steps.description: Added after auth headers. Only set when BOTH config.orgId is truthy AND config.apiKey starts with 'hxi_'. JWT requests never include this header. When orgId is not yet set (bootstrap), the header is omitted.

steps.title: Ambiguous name handling with .filter()
steps.description: Changed .find() to .filter() for org name resolution. If multiple orgs match the same name (case-insensitive), prints all matches with IDs and exits with error instead of silently picking the first.

steps.title: Local-only switch for hxi_ keys
steps.description: For API keys: calls saveConfig({ orgId, orgName }) which uses read-merge-write to preserve the existing apiKey. Never calls /api/auth/switch-org. Never replaces the API key with a JWT.

steps.title: JWT token path preserved
steps.description: The else branch retains the exact existing behavior: calls /api/auth/switch-org, replaces apiKey with the new JWT accessToken, saves orgId/orgName.

steps.title: Config-based current org marker
steps.description: For hxi_ keys: compares org.id to config.orgId (local selection). For JWT tokens: compares to data.organization.id (server state). If no orgId is set in config, no org gets the '(current)' marker.
